public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as permit clerk.
manner: Keeps language exact, as if wording itself is part of the custody chain. In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a permit clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of permit clerk in and around Aurora Heights District, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Aurora Heights District workable through the obligations of permit clerk while managing the immediate pressure of alliances in Shelk.
hidden_pressure: Must make memory legible under conditions that reward forgetting, misfiling, or selective recall. Around Aurora Heights District, that usually means carrying alliances, espionage, elite reputation without letting the role of permit clerk visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Liora Bloomcrest needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Aurora Heights District.
Liora Bloomcrest can entangle the party in seals, claims, or proof requirements that others are trying to blur on purpose.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Liora Bloomcrest communicates in public. In Aurora Heights District, this lands inside a public field already shaped by House Shelk nobility, elite magistrates.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Aurora Heights District: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague

In Shelk, that reads as someone polished, socially alert, and attentive to harmony, status, and cultural presentation, and the habits of a permit clerk still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention. and immediately reads for leverage, obligation, and risk.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Permit Clerk, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Principality of Shelk.
what_they_refuse: Liora Bloomcrest refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing Permit Clerk too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Liora Bloomcrest can open doors, explain local expectations, or redirect trouble before it reaches a harder authority layer.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Liora Bloomcrest adds delay, scrutiny, and reputational drag before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Liora Bloomcrest is Known locally through day-to-day work as permit clerk. and rarely acts without a second motive.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or mercy from a Permit Clerk.
